symbols.name: ActiveEntity
symbols.summary: Abstract base class for entities implementing the Active Entity pattern, embedding CRUD and query operations.

syntax.content: public abstract class ActiveEntity : Entity, IEntity, IEntity where TEntity : ActiveEntity

symbols.name: RegisterDomainEvent(IDomainEvent)
symbols.summary: Registers a domain event. This operation is thread-safe.

syntax.content: public void RegisterDomainEvent(IDomainEvent @event)

parameters.description: The domain event to register.
The domain event to register.

symbols.name: RegisterDomainEvent(IDomainEvent, bool)
symbols.summary: Registers a domain event, optionally ensuring only one event of the same type exists. This operation is thread-safe.

syntax.content: public void RegisterDomainEvent(IDomainEvent @event, bool ensureSingleByType)

parameters.description: The domain event to register.
If true, removes any existing event of the same type before adding the new one.
The domain event to register.
If true, removes any existing event of the same type before adding the new one.

symbols.name: GetDomainEvents()
symbols.summary: Retrieves all registered domain events. This operation is thread-safe, returning a new list (snapshot) of the events.

syntax.content: public IReadOnlyCollection GetDomainEvents()

symbols.name: ClearDomainEvents()
symbols.summary: Clears all registered domain events. This operation is thread-safe.

syntax.content: public void ClearDomainEvents()

symbols.name: HasDomainEvents()
symbols.summary: Checks if any domain events are registered. This operation is thread-safe.

syntax.content: public bool HasDomainEvents()

symbols.name: HasDomainEvent()
symbols.summary: Checks if a specific domain event is registered. This operation is thread-safe.

syntax.content: public bool HasDomainEvent() where TDomainEvent : IDomainEvent

A token to cancel the asynchronous operation.

symbols.name: WithContextAsync(Func, Task>)
symbols.summary: Executes a function with a scoped BridgingIT.DevKit.Domain.ActiveEntityContext%602 for the current entity type. This method creates a new DI scope, resolves the provider and behaviors for the entity, wraps them in an BridgingIT.DevKit.Domain.ActiveEntityContext%602, and passes it into the given action delegate.
symbols.remarks: Use this overload when you only need access to the provider and behaviors wrapped in a context.

syntax.content: public static Task WithContextAsync(Func, Task> action)

parameters.description: A function that receives the resolved BridgingIT.DevKit.Domain.ActiveEntityContext%602 and returns a System.Threading.Tasks.Task%601.

returns.description: The result of the executed action.

parameters.description: A function that receives the resolved BridgingIT.DevKit.Domain.ActiveEntityContext%602 and returns a System.Threading.Tasks.Task%601.

returns.description: The result of the executed action.

symbols.name: WithContextAsync(Func, IEnumerable>, Task>)
symbols.summary: Executes a function with a scoped BridgingIT.DevKit.Domain.ActiveEntityContext%602 and exposes both the provider and all registered BridgingIT.DevKit.Domain.IActiveEntityBehavior%601 instances for the current entity type. This method creates a new DI scope, resolves both the provider and behaviors, wraps them in an BridgingIT.DevKit.Domain.ActiveEntityContext%602, and passes them into the given action delegate.
symbols.remarks: Use this overload when you need access to both the provider and the behaviors (e.g., to manually invoke or inspect behaviors in addition to provider operations).

syntax.content: public static Task WithContextAsync(Func, IEnumerable>, Task> action)

parameters.description: A function that receives the resolved BridgingIT.DevKit.Domain.IActiveEntityEntityProvider%602 and the collection of BridgingIT.DevKit.Domain.IActiveEntityBehavior%601, and returns a System.Threading.Tasks.Task%601.

returns.description: The result of the executed action.

parameters.description: A function that receives the resolved BridgingIT.DevKit.Domain.IActiveEntityEntityProvider%602 and the collection of BridgingIT.DevKit.Domain.IActiveEntityBehavior%601, and returns a System.Threading.Tasks.Task%601.

returns.description: The result of the executed action.
